title: Sam Hamilton
text: Home * People * Sam Hamilton Sam Hamilton , an American chess player [1] , computer scientist and chief technical officer for a small research and development company where he works on predictive and course of action generation algorithms along with a number of related technologies [2] . As computer chess programmer Sam is author of the chess engines LearningLemming and along with Edsel Apostol , co-author of Hannibal [3] .
